engine: Gasoline: 3.6L Pentastar V6 (eTorque), 5.7L HEMI V8 (eTorque available); Diesel: 3.0L EcoDiesel I6 (separate Diesel supplement)

maintenance.service: Oil change indicator driven oil and filter change

interval.logic: Oil change indicator system driven; NEVER exceed 10,000 miles (16,000 km), 12 months, or 350 engine run hours — whichever comes first. More frequent service needed under severe conditions (frequent short trips, trailer tow, extreme temperatures). Service within next 500 miles (805 km) of message. Dealer resets indicator; non-dealer reset steps in Instrument Cluster Display page 92. 350 hours primarily fleet concern.

maintenance.notes: Gasoline and Diesel. Indicator illuminates based on engine operation conditions. Reset required after each oil change.

maintenance.service: Monthly / pre-long-trip check: engine oil level, windshield washer fluid, tire pressures & wear (rotate on irregular wear), coolant / brake master cylinder / power steering fluid levels, all interior & exterior light function

interval.logic: Once every month or before any long trip

maintenance.notes: Gasoline and Diesel. Rotate tires at first sign of irregular wear, even if before oil indicator illuminates.

maintenance.service: Lubricate door hinge roller pivot joints (white lithium grease)
maintenance.notes: Gasoline and Diesel. NOTE: 'Using white lithium grease, lubricate the door hinge roller pivot joints twice a year to prevent premature wear.'

maintenance.service: At every oil-change interval: rotate tires, inspect battery / clean & tighten terminals, inspect CV/Universal joints, inspect brake pads / shoes / rotors / drums / hoses, inspect engine cooling system / hoses, inspect exhaust system, inspect engine air cleaner filter (replace in dusty/off-road conditions), inspect / replace Evaporative System Fresh Air Filter as necessary

interval.logic: At every oil change as indicated by Oil Change Indicator system

maintenance.notes: Gasoline only. Bundle performed at each dealer oil change when indicator is reset.

maintenance.service: At every oil-change interval: change oil and filter, rotate tires, inspect battery / clean & tighten terminals, inspect CV/Universal joints, inspect brake pads / shoes / rotors / drums / hoses / parking brake, inspect engine cooling system / hoses, inspect exhaust system, inspect engine air cleaner filter (replace in dusty/off-road conditions), lubricate door hinge roller pivot joints (twice yearly)

interval.logic: At every oil change as indicated by Oil Change Indicator system

maintenance.notes: Diesel only. Adds DEF tank fill, fuel filter change / water drain.

maintenance.service: Completely fill Diesel Exhaust Fluid (DEF) tank

interval.logic: At every oil change (every 10,000 miles / 12 months per Oil Change Indicator)

maintenance.notes: Diesel only. ALSO listed in table with X marks at every year (1–15) confirming every-oil-change cadence.

maintenance.service: Change fuel filter and drain water from fuel filter assembly

interval.logic: At every oil change. In states mandating biodiesel blends >5% (B6–B20), required every 8,000 miles and must not exceed 6 months.

maintenance.notes: Diesel only. Special California/Minnesota summer and other state mandates apply.

maintenance.service: Inspect CV / Universal joints
maintenance.notes: Gasoline and Diesel. Table shows X at every maintenance checkpoint from 2 through 15 years.

maintenance.service: Inspect front suspension, tie rod ends, and replace if necessary
maintenance.notes: Gasoline and Diesel. X marks at even-year checkpoints: 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14.

maintenance.service: Inspect front and rear axle fluid; change if leakage suspected or if used for police, taxi, fleet, off-road, or frequent trailer towing
maintenance.notes: Gasoline and Diesel. X marks at 3, 6, 9, 12, 15 years.

maintenance.service: Inspect brake linings, rotors, drums, hoses, and parking brake; replace as necessary
maintenance.notes: Gasoline and Diesel. X marks at even-year checkpoints: 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14.

maintenance.service: Inspect transfer case fluid
maintenance.notes: Gasoline only. Also listed separately as inspect AND change for police, taxi, fleet, or frequent trailer towing at years 9 and 15.

maintenance.service: Inspect transfer case fluid; change for police, taxi, fleet, or frequent trailer towing

interval.logic: Years 9 and 15 only (X at 90,000 mi / 144,000 km and 240,000 km / 150,000 mi)

maintenance.notes: Gasoline and Diesel.

maintenance.service: Change transfer case fluid
maintenance.notes: Gasoline and Diesel.

maintenance.service: Replace cabin air filter
maintenance.notes: Gasoline and Diesel. X marks at even-year checkpoints: 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14.

maintenance.service: Replace engine air cleaner filter
maintenance.notes: Gasoline and Diesel. Inspect at every oil-change interval under dusty/off-road conditions; replace as necessary even if before scheduled interval. X marks at 3, 6, 9, 12, 15 years.

maintenance.service: Replace accessory drive belt with OEM grade Mopar belt (Stop/Start equipped models)
maintenance.notes: Gasoline only.

maintenance.service: Replace accessory drive belt(s)
maintenance.notes: Diesel only.

maintenance.service: Replace spark plugs

interval.logic: 100,000 miles (mileage-based only; yearly/months intervals do not apply per footnote **)

maintenance.notes: Gasoline only. Table X marks year 10 (160,000 miles). Footnote explicitly states mileage-based only; yearly intervals do not apply.

maintenance.service: Inspect and replace PCV valve if necessary
maintenance.notes: Gasoline only.

maintenance.service: Flush and replace engine coolant

interval.logic: 10 years or 150,000 miles (240,000 km), whichever comes first. Also shown at year 15 (X at 240,000 km / 150,000 miles).

maintenance.notes: Gasoline and Diesel. Do not exceed 10 years or 150,000 miles.

applicability: All 2021 Ram 1500 DT gasoline engines (3.6L Pentastar V6, 5.7L HEMI V8)
All 2021 Ram 1500 DT diesel engines (3.0L EcoDiesel I6)
2WD and 4WD unless individually noted in source
Severe-duty definitions: police, taxi, fleet, off-road, frequent trailer towing, dusty areas, very short trip driving
validation_flags: Primary source: 2021 Ram 1500 Owner's Manual PDF (document pages 299-306; PDF pages 301-306)
Maintenance schedule extracted from Gasoline section (pages 299-301/302 document) and Diesel section (pages 303-306/307 document)
Task reference to 'pages 299-300' corresponds to document page numbers; PDF physical pages are 301-306
Codex must verify all intervals against rendered PDF pages before production
Gasoline and Diesel share many items but diesel adds DEF, fuel filter/water drain, and biodiesel-specific rules
Oil Change Indicator system governs primary service intervals up to 10,000 mi / 12 mo / 350 hr
Table columns use non-monotonic mileage ordering per original document layout (e.g., 10k→20k→30k→...→90k→160k→100k→176k→...→240k/150k) — preserve source order in logic strings
Spark plug replacement is mileage-based only; yearly intervals do not apply per footnote **
Door hinge lubrication is twice yearly regardless of mileage
Coolant flush at 10 years or 150k miles, whichever comes first; table also shows entry at year 15
Diesel biodiesel (B6-B20) states mandate 8,000 miles / 6 months for oil change and fuel filter
Do not apply schedules from adjacent model years or similar models
